reports.name: Simulated Citizen 1
reports.summary: Thick plastic smoke and toxic fumes from garbage fire.
reports.description: Someone has set fire to a massive pile of plastics and garbage in Karanji near the market. The air is toxic and black smoke is spreading.

reports.name: Simulated Citizen 2
reports.summary: Burning garbage pit causing asthma attacks.
reports.description: The garbage fire in Karanji is still burning. Children and elderly people are having breathing issues. Thick smoke everywhere.

reports.name: Simulated Citizen 3
reports.summary: Smoke from dumping ground fire choking the street.
reports.description: Very bad air quality in Karanji due to the municipal garbage burn. Thick grey smoke is choking the streets.

reports.name: WhatsApp Reporter
reports.summary: Agricultural issue regarding crop stress reported by citizen.
reports.description: inadequate healthcare, poor transportation , lack of clean drinking water

reports.name: Arjun Patel
reports.summary: Widespread blight affecting cotton crops in southern fields.
reports.description: The cotton leaves are turning yellow and black. It is spreading quickly across multiple farms in our village. We need agricultural officers to inspect.

reports.name: Meera Bai
reports.summary: Severe soil moisture depletion threatening wheat seedlings.
reports.description: The ground is cracked and dry. Without immediate canal release or irrigation support, the entire crop season will fail.

reports.name: Ramesh Kumar
reports.summary: Swarm of insects destroying vegetable plantations.
reports.description: Insects are eating all the leaves overnight. Standard pesticides are not working. Requesting advice and intervention.

reports.name: Sanjay Singh
reports.summary: Open burning of municipal solid waste near school.
reports.description: Thick black smoke is entering the school classrooms. Children are coughing. It happens every evening around 5 PM.

reports.name: Amit Patil
reports.summary: Massive pothole on the main village connector road.
reports.description: A very deep pothole has formed near the entrance. Two motorcyclists fell yesterday. Extremely dangerous at night.

reports.name: Sunita Devi
reports.summary: Multiple dengue-like fever cases reported in Ward 3.
reports.description: Over 10 people in our lane have high fever and joint pain. The local clinic is overcrowded. Please set up a medical camp.

reports.name: Vijay Shinde
reports.summary: Unidentified red discharge in local stream.
reports.description: A nearby small industry is releasing red colored water into our drinking stream. Animals are falling sick after drinking it.

reports.name: Karan Sharma
reports.summary: Pedestrian footbridge handrails collapsed.
reports.description: The wooden bridge handrails collapsed after heavy rain. School children use this daily. It needs urgent repair.

reports.name: Lata Mangesh
reports.summary: Muddy tap water supplying Ward 1.
reports.description: Water from public taps has been brown and smelling bad for three days. Many kids are complaining of stomach aches.

reports.name: Rajesh Gore
reports.summary: Streetlights non-functional for past two weeks.
reports.description: Entire lane near the temple is completely dark. High risk of snake bites and theft.

reports.name: Anil Deshmukh
reports.summary: Illegal plastic waste dumping in forest boundary.
reports.description: Tons of plastic bags and bottles are being dumped by commercial trucks. Cows are eating the plastic.

reports.name: Seema Rao
reports.summary: Basic pediatric vaccines out of stock at PHC.
reports.description: Came to vaccinate my 6-month-old but the doctor said vaccines are unavailable. Next supply is two weeks away.

reports.name: Gopal Jadhav
reports.summary: Clogged open drain causing sewage overflow.
reports.description: The main drain is choked with garbage. Water is overflowing onto the streets, causing foul smell and mosquito breeding.

reports.name: Vikram Rathod
reports.summary: Dry pasture lands leading to fodder shortage.
reports.description: Due to low rains, local grazing lands have completely dried up. Cattle feed prices have doubled.

reports.name: Radha Bai
reports.summary: Hailstorm damaged ripening banana plantation.
reports.description: Sudden hail yesterday broke all the banana leaves and stems. Massive loss for 20+ farmers.
